ham.subject: IT Security Notice: Multi-Factor Authentication Rollout
ham.body:
Dear Team,

In line with our ongoing commitment to secure corporate data, the IT Security team will implement a mandatory two-factor authentication (2FA) for all internal systems starting next Monday, March 18th. This upgrade will require every employee to use the Authenticator app provided by the company.

**What you need to do:**
1. Download the Authenticator app (available on iOS and Android).
2. Scan the QR code provided in the attached PDF to link your device.
3. Follow the in‑app steps to complete setup.

If you encounter any issues or have questions, please submit a ticket through the IT Service Portal or email itsupport@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Security Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Balance is Critical – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hello,

We’ve detected a drastic reduction in the balance of your Crypto Wallet on the Binance Matrix Exchange. To avoid a potential lockout, you must verify your account within the next 24 hours.

Because your wallet holds over $12,000 worth of Bitcoin, we’ve triggered a special security measure to protect your assets. Failure to comply will result in a permanent suspension.

**Please verify your identity now:**
1. Log in to our secure portal.
2. Upload a copy of your government ID and a selfie.
3. Click the verification button: <URL>

Once verified, you may choose to receive a 5% staking reward on your balance. Don’t miss this limited‑time offer.

Act now, or risk losing your funds.

Sincerely,
Binance Matrix Security Team
